title: Verified Stochastic Calculus for Mathlib4 — Stochastic Integral, Quadratic Variation, Itô's Lemma, and Large-Deviation Foundations
notes: Pipeline Invariant #14 user-auth granted 2026-05-04 (Phase 6n Session 4); scoping document at temporary/working-docs/phase6n/i3_bundle_scoping.md.
